description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow set within a rectangular plot, featuring a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is surrounded by a manicured lawn and a perimeter fence, with a paved driveway leading up to the main entrance. The front yard is landscaped with a mix of shrubs and small trees, while the backyard offers a more open green space. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light inside. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by wooden and glass accents. The property includes a small patio area and a visible pathway connecting the entrance to the street.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped surroundings, set within a fenced rectangular plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped front yard, and driveway with visible pathway and greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the division between the lawn and paved areas, with trees lining the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open backyard, flat roof, and the back facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, fence, and a row of trees along the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
